signals.text: Strong rebound to $89.5K (+13.7% WoW). 95% organic revenue, net profit $34.1K. Brand pulls without ad dependency.
Engagement exploded +905% WoW — Jason Momoa reel drove 475 likes + 44 comments. Reach hit 342.8K (+298%). Video outperforming carousel 8:1.
Revenue flat at $23.6K (+1.6%). CVR dropped to 1.7% (-0.9pp). Sessions up 64% from GA4, but conversion isn't keeping pace with traffic.
ROAS declined to 0.8x on +56% spend — $3,727 spend, 87 purchases. Prospecting/Traffic campaign ($948) generated 0 purchases. Retention (2.2x) carrying the weight.
Subscriptions still bleeding: net -32 WoW — 97 cancels vs 65 new. Active subs at 4,059. Multiple consecutive negative weeks. Needs intervention.

watchItems.why: 97 cancels vs 65 new for multiple weeks. Activate a winback/retention campaign or subscription-exclusive offer ASAP.
$948 spend with 0 purchases is pure waste. Reallocate to Retention (2.2x) or LAL (2.5x).
-210 net subscribers. Unsub rate exceeding new signups — audit pop-up forms and frequency.
No weekly report this week. Ping Danielle for the 4/7–4/13 file.
342K reach from one reel. Consider a follow-up post or paid boost while engagement is hot.

amazon.insight: Strong rebound to $89.5K (+13.7% WoW) with 95% organic revenue. Net profit $34.1K, margin healthy at 38.1%. TACOS ticked up to 3.2% on a 67% ad spend increase but still well within the 8.3% guardrail. Brand is pulling organically — ad spend is incremental, not load-bearing.

dtc.insight: DTC revenue essentially flat at $23.6K (+1.6%) but CVR dropped to 1.7% (-0.9pp) and AOV fell below $30. Sessions surged 64% from GA4 but conversion didn't keep pace — traffic quality may be lower. Email/Klaviyo share dipped to 26.2% of DTC (-6.4% WoW).

subscriptions.insight: Third consecutive week net-negative. 97 cancels vs 65 new, active subs down to 4,059. Klaviyo list also bleeding (-210 net). Urgent: launch a winback campaign with a subscription-exclusive offer, and audit top cancellation reasons in Recharge.

topPost.description: Jason Momoa reel — massive engagement, video content crushing it. 163 avg engagement/post for video vs 20 for carousel.

social.insight: Engagement exploded +905% WoW driven by Jason Momoa reel (475 likes, 44 comments). Reach hit 342.8K (+298%). Video outperforming carousel 8:1 on engagement. Capitalize on the momentum — consider a follow-up post or paid boost while engagement is hot.

google.note: No Stella Rising report received for 4/7–4/13. Last report covered 3/29–4/4.

paidMedia.totalSpendNote: Meta only; Stella Rising report missing this week
paidMedia.insight: Meta ROAS dropped to 0.8x on 56% higher spend ($3,727). Prospecting/Traffic campaign burned $948 with zero purchases — immediate pause recommended. Retention campaign (2.2x ROAS) is carrying all performance. Reallocate Prospecting budget to Retention or LAL.

klaviyo.insight: Earth Month campaign was the top performer ($2,562, 54.6% open rate). Checkout Abandonment flow at 11.8% open rate signals deliverability or timing issue — needs creative refresh. Zero attributed conversions across Klaviyo is a data gap, not reality ($6.2K in email revenue per Triple Whale). Audit Klaviyo-Shopify integration.
